# Automotive AI Skills

> Open-source collection of 16 AI skills (structured prompt frameworks) for automotive diagnostics, maintenance, repair, customization, EVs, and motorcycles. Platform-agnostic — works with Claude, ChatGPT, or any capable LLM. Content available in English and Japanese (all skills) and Spanish (core skills). MIT licensed.

Key facts:
- Each skill defines capabilities, ready-to-use example prompts, a recommended workflow, and honest limitations.
- Safety-first design: torque specs and capacities are always ranges to verify against factory documentation; brakes, steering, SRS, fuel, and EV high-voltage work is deferred to professionals.
- The project never provides guidance on defeating emissions controls, safety systems, odometers, or immobilizers.
- Machine-readable metadata: each skill folder has a skill.yaml; known issues have a structured index.yaml.

## Skills

- [Mechanic Assistant](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/mechanic-assistant/): repair procedures, torque spec guidance, tools, system explanations
- [OBD-II Diagnostic Assistant](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/obd2-diagnostic-assistant/): trouble codes (DTC), freeze frame, live data interpretation
- [Vehicle Maintenance Planner](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/vehicle-maintenance-planner/): preventive maintenance schedules, severe-service adjustments, catch-up plans
- [Used Car Inspector](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/used-car-inspector/): pre-purchase checklists, red flags, negotiation support
- [Vehicle Troubleshooting](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/vehicle-troubleshooting/): symptom-first diagnosis — noises, vibrations, smells, leaks, warning lights
- [Vehicle Customization Advisor](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/vehicle-customization-advisor/): modification planning, fitment math, build order, legality flags
- [EV Assistant](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/ev-assistant/): charging strategy, battery health, range, EV-specific maintenance
- [Motorcycle Mechanic](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/motorcycle-mechanic/): chains, carbs and EFI, valve clearances, suspension setup
- [Diesel Specialist](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/diesel-specialist/): common rail, DPF/EGR/SCR (AdBlue), glow plugs, turbos
- [Classic Car Restorer](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/classic-car-restorer/): points ignition, carburetors, rust assessment, parts sourcing
- [Fleet Manager](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/fleet-manager/): multi-vehicle scheduling, cost tracking, repair-vs-replace analysis
- [Tire & Wheel Advisor](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/tire-wheel-advisor/): sizing math, fitment, seasonal strategy, wear diagnosis, TPMS
- [Commercial Vehicle & Truck Assistant](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/commercial-vehicle-assistant/): air brakes, pre-trip inspections, load securing
- [Body & Paint Assistant](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/body-paint-assistant/): dent/scratch assessment, repair paths, paint matching, DIY limits
- [Towing & Trailer Advisor](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/towing-trailer-advisor/): hitches, tongue weight, trailer wiring and brakes, sway prevention
- [Car Audio & Electronics Assistant](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/skills/car-audio-electronics/): head units, amps, dash cams, 12V wiring discipline, CAN-bus limits

## Guides

- [Getting Started](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/docs/getting-started.html): five-minute walkthrough from finding the repo to a productive session
- [FAQ](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/docs/faq.html): trust, accuracy, platform, and usage questions answered directly
- [Safety Disclaimer](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/docs/safety-disclaimer.html): verification rules and professional-territory boundaries
- [Skill Authoring Guide](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/docs/skill-authoring-guide.html): required structure and quality bar for new skills
- [Japan Guide (日本語)](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/docs/ja/japan-guide.html): US-to-Japan reading table, kei cars, terminology glossary
- [Shaken Checklist (車検, 日本語)](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/docs/ja/shaken-checklist.html): pre-inspection self-check for Japan's vehicle inspection

## Data

- [Known-Issues Database](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/data/known-issues/): community-contributed model-specific issues — 11 entries covering BMW, Toyota, Subaru, Honda, Nissan, and Mazda (engines, CVTs/DCTs, rotaries) and growing, with a machine-readable index.yaml
- [Example Conversations](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/examples/): annotated full sessions — P0420 diagnosis, used-car inspection, maintenance catch-up plan

## Optional

- [Integrations](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/integrations/): Claude Code plugin (/plugin marketplace add shoka-jp/automotive-ai-skills), OpenAI Codex guide (AGENTS.md), Claude Project template, and a combined Garage Assistant system prompt
- [Japanese README (日本語)](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/README.ja.html)
- [Spanish README (Español)](https://shoka-jp.github.io/automotive-ai-skills/README.es.html)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/shoka-jp/automotive-ai-skills)
- [obd2-mcp](https://github.com/shoka-jp/obd2-mcp): companion MCP server that reads real vehicles (DTCs, live data, freeze frame, VIN) via ELM327 adapters; mock vehicle included
